nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.comment: Accepts JSON: { audio (base64), channel (optional), api_key (optional header or body) }. Set WHISPER_API_KEY env var to enable authentication.

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.comment: API key auth (if WHISPER_API_KEY set). Validates audio size (max ~2MB base64), channel format.

nodes.name: Whisper STT API
nodes.comment: Uses validated audio input. 120 second timeout.

parameters.text:
={{ '*Whisper STT Failed*

**Error:** ' + (($input.all()[0]?.error?.message || $input.all()[0]?.error?.description || 'Unknown error')).toString().slice(0, 997).trimEnd() + '

Please check:
- Whisper service is running
- Audio file is provided and under ~2MB base64
- API key is correct (if configured)' }}

nodes.name: Discord Error
nodes.comment: Catches errors from all nodes. Uses Validate Input for channel access and shows validation requirements.
